name: Invalid - Bad Path Length Encoding
description: Tests invalid path_len values including the reserved hash_size=4 and path overflow conditions.

vectors.description: Reserved hash size code 3 (hash_size would be 4): path_len=0xC0
vectors.notes: path_len=0xC0: bits 6-7=11 (hash size code 3). isValidPathLen returns false because hash_size==4.

vectors.description: Reserved hash size code 3 with non-zero count: path_len=0xC1
vectors.notes: path_len=0xC1: hash size code 3 (reserved), count=1. Invalid regardless of count.

vectors.description: Reserved hash size code 3, max count: path_len=0xFF
vectors.notes: path_len=0xFF: hash size code 3 (reserved), count=63. Even if hash_size=4 were valid, 63*4=252 > MAX_PATH_SIZE.

vectors.description: Path overflow: hash_size=2, count=33 (66 bytes > MAX_PATH_SIZE)
vectors.notes: path_len=0x61: hash_size=2, count=33. 33*2=66 > MAX_PATH_SIZE (64). isValidPathLen returns false.

vectors.description: Path overflow: hash_size=3, count=22 (66 bytes > MAX_PATH_SIZE)
Path overflow edge case: hash_size=1, count=63 is valid (63<=64), but with hash_size=2 and count=33 it overflows
